FAQ

FMCG &amp; Retail packaging, FAQ

Who is a good fmcg & retail packaging supplier in India?
K P Packaging is a Mumbai based manufacturer and distributor supplying fmcg & retail packaging, including Chromo Paper, MG Poster Paper, Folding Box Board, Duplex Board, to clients across 20+ countries.
What packaging materials does the fmcg & retail industry use?
High gloss, print ready chromo and poster papers plus folding box board for retail packaging that needs shelf appeal and structural strength.
Can K P Packaging supply fmcg & retail packaging for export?
Yes. K P Packaging serves 425+ clients across more than 20 countries, including fmcg & retail customers.

Need fmcg & retail packaging?

Share your specification and we'll recommend the right grade and finish.

KPK P Packaging

A three decade family business converting and distributing coated papers and flexible packaging for pharma, food and FMCG, in India and 20+ countries.
